corrections.text: The article states 'Using micro-destructive acid etching to preserve the physical structure of the teeth... [as reported by Live Science].' The Live Science snapshot does not use the term 'micro-destructive acid etching.' The Nature paper (doi.org/10.1038/s41586-026-10478-8) describes the method as 'an acid etching method' applied to 'a small area of the enamel,' which is substantively consistent but does not use the 'micro-destructive' qualifier. The description is attributed to the wrong source.
